name: Poro 34B
archDisplay: Dense transformer, BLOOM architecture + ALiBi (54 layers, d_model 7168, 56 heads)
note: Fully open Apache-2.0 Finnish/English/code model trained on 1T tokens on the LUMI supercomputer; pivotal European low-resource open LLM.
tpsNote: Q4 GGUF (~20GB) fits on a single 24GB RTX 4090 with limited headroom for context.

results.notes: Finnish FIN-bench average; FinGPT 13B scored 48.92 for comparison
HumanEval (Python, pass@10) per arXiv:2404.01856 Table 8; corrected from 41.8, a prior value that was not a pure HumanEval score.

MBPP (Python) score from Table 8 (Code benchmark results) of the Poro 34B paper (Luukkonen et al., arXiv:2404.01856), directly adjacent to the already-recorded HumanEval 37.20 score; the two together form the paper's reported Code average of 41.80.

verificationNotes: Fully confirmed by fetching the actual arXiv PDF (2404.01856, Luukkonen et al., "Poro 34B and the Blessing of Multilinguality") and the HF model card. Architecture (54 layers, d_model 7168, 56 heads, BLOOM+ALiBi), 34.2B params, Apache-2.0 license, and 2048 sequence length all match Table 5 of the paper exactly. All 8 benchmark rows verified literally against Tables 6, 7, and 8 of the paper, including the FinGPT-13B=48.92 comparison note and the HumanEval/MBPP average (37.20/47.40 → 41.80).
